catalogue::outlet.query: SELECT distinct b.loginid FROM ck_user a JOIN ck_user b ON INSTR(a.hierarchy, b.loginid ) > 0 JOIN ck_userdesignation ud on b.loginid= ud.login_id where ud.designation in (select division_name from ck_division where channel_division=1) and a.loginid='{{outletCode}}';

integrationStatusQuery::findByTime.query: select entity_name,status,count from(select attributes->>'$.entityName' entity_name,'total' status, ifNull(attributes->>'$.sourceCount',0) count from ck_task where type='INTEGRATION_AUDIT' and attributes->>'$.entityName'!='Order' and creation_time>=FROM_UNIXTIME('{{startTime}}'/1000) and creation_time<FROM_UNIXTIME('{{endTime}}'/1000) union select entity_name,status,count(1) as count from ck_integration_history where timestamp>='{{startTime}}' and timestamp<'{{endTime}}' group by entity_name,status) res1 union all select 'PSRTargets' as entity_name, 'Success' as status,count(1) as count from ck_targets where user_type='psr' and last_modified_time between convert_tz(date_format(curdate(),'%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00'),'+05:30','+00:00') and convert_tz(date_format(curdate(),'%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59'),'+05:30','+00:00')

integrationStatusQueryRedshift::findByTi.query: SELECT CASE WHEN transformerinfo[0].transformerId = 'unnati_WD_master' THEN 'WD_Master' WHEN transformerinfo[0].transformerId = 'mdm_user_psr_integ' THEN 'PSR_Master' WHEN transformerinfo[0].transformerId = 'ProductDetailsIntegrate' THEN 'ProductDetails_Master' WHEN transformerinfo[0].transformerId = 'mdm_outlet_market_integ' THEN 'Market_Master' WHEN transformerinfo[0].transformerId = 'mdm_pjp_adherence_integ' THEN 'PJP_Adherence_Master' WHEN transformerinfo[0].transformerId = 'mdm_targets_transformer' THEN 'Target_Master' WHEN transformerinfo[0].transformerId = 'mdm_user_metadata_integ' THEN 'User_MetaData_Master' WHEN transformerinfo[0].transformerId = 'VistaarTargetsTransformer' THEN 'Vistaar_Target_Master' WHEN transformerinfo[0].transformerId = 'ProductDetailsIntegrate_integ' THEN 'ProductDetails_Master' WHEN transformerinfo[0].transformerId = 'mdm_productmetadata_jolt_integ' THEN 'ProductMetaData_Master' WHEN transformerinfo[0].transformerId = 'mdm_stockist_transformer_integ1' THEN 'Stockist_Master' ELSE transformerinfo[0].transformerId END AS entity_name, recordstatus AS status, COUNT(1) AS count FROM ex_schema_dataintegration.integration_failure WHERE lob = '{{lob}}' AND "timestamp" >= TIMESTAMP '{{startTime}}' AND "timestamp" < TIMESTAMP '{{endTime}}' GROUP BY 1, 2 UNION SELECT CASE WHEN transformerinfo[0].transformerId = 'unnati_WD_master' THEN 'WD_Master' WHEN transformerinfo[0].transformerId = 'mdm_user_psr_integ' THEN 'PSR_Master' WHEN transformerinfo[0].transformerId = 'ProductDetailsIntegrate' THEN 'ProductDetails_Master' WHEN transformerinfo[0].transformerId = 'mdm_outlet_market_integ' THEN 'Market_Master' WHEN transformerinfo[0].transformerId = 'mdm_pjp_adherence_integ' THEN 'PJP_Adherence_Master' WHEN transformerinfo[0].transformerId = 'mdm_targets_transformer' THEN 'Target_Master' WHEN transformerinfo[0].transformerId = 'mdm_user_metadata_integ' THEN 'User_MetaData_Master' WHEN transformerinfo[0].transformerId = 'VistaarTargetsTransformer' THEN 'Vistaar_Target_Master' WHEN transformerinfo[0].transformerId = 'ProductDetailsIntegrate_integ' THEN 'ProductDetails_Master' WHEN transformerinfo[0].transformerId = 'mdm_productmetadata_jolt_integ' THEN 'ProductMetaData_Master' WHEN transformerinfo[0].transformerId = 'mdm_stockist_transformer_integ1' THEN 'Stockist_Master' ELSE transformerinfo[0].transformerId END AS entity_name, 'Total' AS status, COUNT(1) AS count FROM ex_schema_dataintegration.integration_streams WHERE lob = '{{lob}}' AND retrycount <= 0 AND "timestamp" >= TIMESTAMP '{{startTime}}' AND "timestamp" < TIMESTAMP '{{endTime}}' GROUP BY 1

listener-config::listener-class-info.description: Listen CDM events and run custom scripts
Listen for new Anlytic loading events

offers::upload.itemQuery: select * from ck_productdetails where (brand = '{{brand}}' or ''= '{{brand}}') and (category= '{{category}}' or ''= '{{category}}') and (sub_category= '{{subCategory}}' or ''= '{{subCategory}}')  and (batch_code= '{{batchCode}}' or ''= '{{batchCode}}') and (sku_code= '{{skuCode}}' or ''= '{{skuCode}}')  and (product= '{{product}}' or ''= '{{product}}')

payloadConfig.description: Fetching delivery status from the user if order status is not delivered for X no of days .

orderget::v2.orderQuery: SELECT cu.name,cu.mobile,cod.outlet_name,cod.contactno,cod.outlet_name,ord.delivery_date,ord.lob, ord.id,ord.extended_attributes, ord.order_number, ord.creation_time, ord.bill_amount, ord.line_count, ord.net_amount, ord.reference_number, ord.remarks, ord.source, ord.total_amount, ord.total_mrp, ord.total_quantity, ord.type, ord.outletcode, ord.supplierid, ord.status, ord.normalized_quantity, ord.loginid, ord.discount_info, cu.name AS supplierName, cod.outlet_name AS outletName, ord.delivery_date, ord.system_time, ord.last_modified_time, ord.total_initial_quantity, ord.status_reason, ord.initial_normalized_quantity FROM ck_orders ord JOIN (SELECT loginid, name, mobile FROM ck_user) cu ON ord.supplierid = cu.loginid JOIN (SELECT outletcode, outlet_name, contactno FROM ck_outlet_details) cod ON ord.outletcode = cod.outletcode WHERE ord.id IN (SELECT id FROM order_ids) ORDER BY {DYNAMIC_SORT}
orderget::v2.orderDetailsQuery: SELECT ods.product_key,ods.discount_info,ods.initial_amount, ods.extended_attributes,ods.order_number,ods.extended_attributes, ods.order_number, ods.name, ods.product_info, ods.mrp, ods.batch_code, ods.case_quantity, ods.case_price, ods.piece_quantity, ods.price, ods.other_unit_quantity, ods.net_amount, ods.bill_amount, ods.discount_info, ods.normalized_quantity, ods.initial_quantity, ods.initial_normalized_quantity, ods.sales_quantity, ods.normalized_volume, ods.type, ods.skucode, ods.order_id, ods.product_key FROM ck_order_details ods WHERE ods.order_id IN (SELECT id FROM order_ids)

outletdetails::customquery.outletDetailsQuery: SELECT od.id,od.active_status,od.active_status_reason,od.creation_time,od.extended_attributes,od.last_modified_time,od.address,od.beat,od.beat_name,od.channel,od.contact_name,od.contactno,od.display_address,od.frequency,od.mapped,od.outletcode as outletCode,od.outlet_name,od.outlet_type,od.location_hierarchy as location,od.loginid AS userName,od.source,od.last_order_date,od.latitude,od.longitude,od.account,od.gst_no,od.market_id,od.market_name,od.outlet_category,od.outlet_class,od.tin_no,od.coordinate,od.doo,od.distribution_channel,od.outlet_division,od.sold_to,od.sub_channel,od.sub_territory,od.email,od.blob_key,od.control_group,od.price_list_id,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT hm.parent) as immediateParent FROM ck_outlet_details od INNER JOIN ck_outlet_details_hierarchymetadata m ON od.id = m.outlet_id INNER JOIN ck_hierarchy_metadata hm ON hm.id = m.hierarchy_metadata_id {{HIERARCHY_FILTER}} {{DYNAMIC_FILTER}} GROUP BY od.outletcode LIMIT {DYNAMIC_LIMIT};

password::passwordComplexity.message: Password must be 8-20 characters with lower case, uppercase, digit, & special character.

productdetails::upload.query: SELECT distinct a.* FROM ck_user a JOIN ck_userdesignation p WHERE a.loginid=p.login_id and p.designation = 'supplier'and json_search(json_extract(a.extended_attributes,'$.channel'),'all','{{channel}}')

ProductMetaData::CatalogueQuery.query: select pd.*,pm.* from ck_productdetails pd left outer join ck_productmetadata pm on pm.sku_code=pd.batch_code where pm.active_status = 'active' and pd.active_status='active'

productmetadata::upload.query: select ck_user.* from ck_user inner join ck_userdesignation on ck_user.loginid = ck_userdesignation.login_id inner join ck_location on ck_user.location_hierarchy = ck_location.location_hierarchy where (state = '{{state}}' or ''='{{state}}') and (city = '{{city}}' or ''='{{city}}') and (json_search(json_extract(ck_user.extended_attributes,'$.channel'),'all','{{channel}}') or ''='{{channel}}') and designation ='supplier'

data.description2: Stock will made by given supplier information.

Stock.name: Stock
Stock.description: This configuration will help to set stock at selected level. It is mandatory configuration for data storage and its processing.

data.description2: Offers will be multiplied with all suppliers if not provided in offers sheet. If provided they will persist as it is.
Offers will be multiplied by channel wise.
Offers will be multiplied by outlet category wise.
Offers will be multiplied by city wise if not present in uploaded data based on stored location.
Offers will be multiplied by region wise if not present in uploaded data based on stored location.
Offers will be multiplied by country wise if not present in uploaded data based on stored location.
Offers will be uploaded by considering location city and channel
Offers will be uploaded by considering location city and OutletType

Offers.name: Offers
Offers.description: This configuration will help to set offers at selected level. It is mandatory configuration for data storage and its processing.

data.description2: ProductMetaData will be multiplied by supplier wise if not provided. If provided they will persist as it is.
ProductMetaData will be multiplied by supplier and channel wise if not provided. If provided they will persist as it is.
ProductMetaData will be multiplied by channel wise.
ProductMetaData will be made by given branch and channel.
ProductMetaData will be made by given country.

data.header: Upload: Country Wise, Catalogue: Category Wise
data.description2: ProductMetaData will upload by country wise and catalogue will be fetched by user defined categories

ProductMetaData.name: ProductMetaData
ProductMetaData.description: This configuration will help to set products at selected level. It is mandatory configuration for data storage and its processing.

templates::facebook.data:
Hi {{userName}},
